suggestions.title: App.jsx is 1025 lines — CRITICAL: needs component extraction (7th flag)
suggestions.description: App.jsx contains WorkerCard, StatsBar, ActivityLog, ProgressBar, EmptyState, LoadingSkeleton all in one file. Extract each into its own file under src/components/. This is the 7th time this has been flagged. WorkerCard alone is ~100 lines. StatsBar is ~50. ActivityLog + helpers are ~80. This would make App.jsx ~400 lines and massively improve maintainability.

suggestions.title: Missing React.memo on WorkerCard, StatsBar, ActivityLog (10th flag)
suggestions.description: WorkerCard re-renders on every poll cycle (30s) even when its props haven't changed. Wrap WorkerCard, StatsBar, ActivityLogEntry, and ProgressBar in React.memo. CharacterAvatar and Character in Office.jsx already use memo — apply the same pattern consistently. With 5+ workers, this causes unnecessary DOM thrashing.

suggestions.title: No ErrorBoundary — any component crash kills the entire app (7th flag)
suggestions.description: If Office.jsx or any WorkerCard throws (e.g., bad data from workers.json), the entire app white-screens. Add a React ErrorBoundary wrapping at minimum the Office and workers-grid sections. Show a friendly fallback ('Something went wrong, retrying...') and auto-retry fetch. This is basic production resilience.

suggestions.title: vibeStreak sessionStorage logic is broken — increments on every render
suggestions.description: In the useEffect for vibeStreak (line ~680), the streak increments every time the effect runs, not just on poll cycles. Since teamVibe.key doesn't change between renders but the effect still fires, it counts up incorrectly. Fix: compare with a ref of the previous value and only increment when the key actually matches the PREVIOUS value from sessionStorage, not the current stored value.

suggestions.title: completionToast has no pointer-events:none — blocks clicks for 3 seconds
suggestions.description: The completionToast div at the bottom of the screen has pointerEvents: 'none' set inline, but the confetti-layer divs above it do NOT have pointer-events:none. When workerConfetti fires, the confetti-layer covers the entire viewport and blocks all interaction for 2.5s. Add pointer-events:none to .confetti-layer in CSS.

suggestions.title: Two separate fetch calls on every poll — bundle into one request
suggestions.description: syncFromGitHub makes two parallel fetch calls to raw.githubusercontent.com (workers.json + activity.json). While Promise.allSettled is good, consider combining both into a single JSON file (e.g., state.json with {workers, roster, activity}) to halve the network requests. GitHub's raw CDN has rate limits.

suggestions.title: Tab toggle buttons missing aria-label for keyboard shortcut hints
suggestions.description: The tab buttons show title='Office view (press 1)' but screen readers won't announce title attributes consistently. Add aria-keyshortcuts='1' and aria-keyshortcuts='2' to the tab buttons. Also, the theme toggle and sync button lack visible focus indicators in the current CSS.

suggestions.title: StatsBar grid overflows on narrow screens (< 400px)
suggestions.description: The stats-bar uses a CSS grid that doesn't wrap well below 400px. The sync-status and vibe cards get squished. Add a flex-wrap fallback or reduce the grid to 2 columns on very small screens. The stuck-worker card also has long text that can overflow its container.

suggestions.title: No way to see worker history beyond 3 entries on card flip
suggestions.description: The worker card back side only shows the last 3 activity entries (.slice(-3)). For workers like Maya who have had many tasks, users can't see their full history. Consider a 'View all' link or scrollable list on the back of the card.

suggestions.title: Office plants don't respond to theme — dark green on dark bg is invisible
suggestions.description: The SVG plants use hardcoded green fills (#22c55e, #16a34a) which work on the dark theme but look fine on light too. However, the pot colors (#c2410c, #92400e) are very dark and nearly invisible on dark theme. Consider slightly lighter pot fills or a subtle outline.

suggestions.title: Canvas favicon regenerated on every activeWorkers change
suggestions.description: The favicon useEffect creates a new canvas element and draws a circle on every render where activeWorkers changes — even if the color hasn't changed. Memoize the color value and skip the canvas work when it's the same as last time.

suggestions.title: No loading state when sync button is clicked — only Bloberto typing dots
suggestions.description: When clicking the sync button, isSyncing is set but the only visual feedback is Bloberto's typing dots in the office view. In dashboard view, there's no indication that a refresh is happening. Add a subtle spinner or pulse to the sync button itself.
